title: ChongDu — Chongqing + Chengdu mid-Shanghai-semester trip
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's Sep 28 – Oct 3 itinerary for a chongqing → chengdu mini-trip during his shanghai study abroad semester — co-planned with someone tracking outfits in Korean (likely joo).
  • Food list is half Korean-language, half Chinese: 마라 (mala), 훠궈 (hot pot), 탄탄면 (dandan noodles), 충칭소면 (Chongqing xiaomian), 러우지아모, 삥펀, 납작복숭아 — proof of who he was traveling with.
  • Day-by-day plan with weather, outfit notes, hairstyles ("white dress 양쪽 땋은 반머리, 꽃") — co-planning artifact, not solo-Yahir voice.
  • Major sights: People's Liberation Monument, hongya cave, Liziba Station, shibati, huguang guild hall, panda research base, wuhou shrine, An Shun Bridge.
  • Privacy: doc contains booking confirmation numbers + hotel addresses + phone numbers — left in raw, not surfaced in summary.

Connections

  • china chapter · shanghai study abroad · chongqing · chengdu · sichuan food

The trip shape

A 5-day jaunt from shanghai to chongqing (3 days) → chengdu (2 days) → back to Shanghai. Train between the two cities (Chongqing Shapingba → Chengdu, 2:20pm departure, ~1hr ride).

Day-by-day:

  • 9/28 — Arrive Chongqing 7:30, Jiefangbei pedestrian street, mala chaoshou
  • 9/29 — Hot/rainy 33/19, Huguang Guild Hall, tea stall, hongya cave night view
  • 9/30 — Cool/rainy 19/17, Liziba viewing platform, Linggong Palace, shibati hotpot
  • 10/1 — Reminisce day (massage, coffee), train to Chengdu, Kuai/Zhai alleys, 6pm sichuan opera at Qin Tai Lu (Shu Feng Ya Yun), International Finance Center
  • 10/2 — panda research base, wuhou shrine, An Shun Bridge, SKP
  • 10/3 — Checkout, 4pm flight back

Co-planning evidence

The doc reads as a Yahir + travel-partner artifact. Outfit notes in Korean ("blue dress 양똥머리/ 포니테일 꽃으로 묶어서" = "blue dress, pigtails / ponytail tied with flower") are coded as someone else's planning voice — not Yahir's. Korean food vocabulary throughout: 곱창국수, 훠궈, 청두 (Chengdu in Hangul), 탄탄면.

This makes the trip joo-coded — paired with Yahir's later mentions of dating across the shanghai study abroad timeframe, this is likely the trip with her. Cross-reference required during densify.

What he actually wanted to eat

The food list at top is the sequencing rationale for the whole trip:

  • Chongqing: 麻辣 mala, 火锅 hot pot, chongqing xiaomian, fried chicken giblets, douhua, mala chicken, spring water chicken
  • 탄탄면 (dandan noodles)
  • 충칭소면 (Chongqing xiaomian)
  • 러우지아모 (rou jia mo, Chinese hamburger)
  • 삥펀 (bingfen, sweet jelly)
  • 찹살빵 (sticky rice bread)
  • 납작복숭아 (flat peach)

This is the sichuan food pilgrimage — Yahir treating the trip as a culinary checklist as much as a sights-checklist.

Why it matters in the graph

This is one of the few in-China travel artifacts where Yahir is navigating internally to China rather than to/from it. The shanghai study abroad period in vault summaries is mostly about the city itself — chongqing and chengdu are its mid-semester escape, the sichuan food field-trip, and the moment Yahir's life is most physically integrated with someone Korean-speaking.

The detail of the doc (weather to outfits to hotel phone numbers) is a sign of the era: this is a real trip with logistics, not a thought experiment.

Privacy

Doc contains:

  • Mcsrh Maijia Shiqu Hotel booking #35379486833, pin 8736, hotel confirmation 1286357869201833984, phone +86-17783036373
  • Rayfont Hotel booking #35379603898, pin 2068, confirmation 34371760, phone +86-28-61280000

Not surfaced into summary. Bookings are 18+ months stale and irrelevant operationally.
